pr.title: Record: FarnsworthEngine v1 — TTT + 11L Int6 MLP3x, val_bpb=1.1303

output.summary: Stacking test-time SGD adaptation on a quantized 11-layer MLP3x with SmearGate/BigramHash plus Muon/SWA before sliding-window evaluation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Per-record TTT, the full weight model is fine-tuned via SGD on validation shards before the sliding-window scoring pass.
techniques: Test-time training on validation shards before scoring
Int6 MLP3x with SmearGate, BigramHash, and NTK-RoPE
Muon optimizer with SWA and sliding-window eval
